titleStmt.title: Letter from Sheila Doogan to Charlie Daly, 4 December 1922
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Sheila Doogan

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

correspAction.placeName: C/O Mr Hegarty, 3 Westland Avenue, Derry, Ireland
Drumboe Castle, Stranorlar, Tirconaill, Donegal, Ireland

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
Censored Cormac O'Dalaigh
Prisoner
Drumboe Castle
Stranorlar
Tir Chonaill
C/O Mr Hegarty
3 Westland Ave
Derry 4.12.22 A Chathal, a chara. Just to greet you behind
iron bars. I trust your fellow Prisoners
and self are none the worse of the
bread & water diet. A Sturdy Rebel
can stand a lot of hardship. I
hope Ginger is quite better. The rest
will certainly do him good. Im getting along A1 in
Derry. The work is quite easy &
then the town is in a free. State so
to say. Very! very few troops or
Craigs Specials to be seen atall.
At least not notably running about. So
that's a blessing. I suppose there is
no use in sending you a parcel. Miss
Larkin says no. Katie sent Ginger
cigarettes. Did he get them. I suppose Francie is hoa
singing the Oul songs, also Sha
& J.J. Did they compose any about the
wild & rugged Gap of Meenabol yet?
That's a Gap in future History you know. Well, as there is nothing
to interest you that would reach
you safely I shall finish by sending
best wishes to Shaw J.J. Jim,Tim,
Frank, Dan hot Dan No 2, & Ginger??? Did I
name anyone that wasn't got. No, I think
I didn't so with Best Wishes to
Self.
yrs Very Sincerely
Shiela Doogan
